summary: This is a rough plan for the demo.

local.change_request: This is a rough plan for the demo.
local.intent_analysis:
Ask: Author a refined plan for "the demo" — change_request is intentionally meta/test-shaped. Treat as: produce a runnable demo plan that showcases abtree (most plausible referent given repo context).
Type: feature/docs (demo asset), not a fix or migration.
Affected systems/files: docs/ (likely a guide page), .abtree/trees/* (existing bundled trees as demo material), README.md (entry pointers), scripts/generate-examples.ts.
Constraints/requirements: must run end-to-end with shipped CLI; no extra deps; align with STYLEGUIDE.md tone; reproducible from a fresh clone; aligns with existing bundled-tree examples surfaced in docs.
Likely codeowners: no CODEOWNERS file present. Default reviewer: repo owner / git author Jonathan Turnock <jonathanturnock@flying-dice.com>.
Acceptance criteria:
- A demo script/walkthrough exists describing setup -> tree pick -> execution loop -> outcome.
- Uses a bundled tree (hello-world or refine-plan) so no custom YAML is needed.
- Steps verified by running them locally; output matches what the doc shows.
- Linked from docs index and/or README so a new user can find it.
